title: Year 7 New Zealand Curriculum - Ministry of Education
content:
## Year 7 New Zealand Curriculum
Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their seventh year at school, and ideas on how to support their learning at home.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
- First 6 months at school

- Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum

- Year 4 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 5 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 6 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 7 New Zealand Curriculum Mathematics and Statistics in Year 7 English in Year 7 Science in Year 7 Health and Physical Education in Year 7 Technology in Year 7 Social Sciences in Year 7 The Arts in Year 7

We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## By the end of Year 7 #
Knowing what your child is learning in Year 7 at school will help you support and guide them as they begin learning reading, writing and maths every day.
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 7 In Years 7 and 8, the focus is on helping children see themselves as part of a bigger world and encouraging them to develop greater independence. Find out more

### Mathematics and Statistics in Year 7
In Years 7 and 8, the focus is on helping children see themselves as part of a bigger world and encouraging them to develop greater independence.
- English in Year 7 For English in Year 7, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing. Find out more
For English in Year 7, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing.
- Science in Year 7 In Year 7, your child will work with more complex ideas and unfamiliar contexts and begin to recognise that science helps us understand and solve real-world problems. Find out more
In Year 7, your child will work with more complex ideas and unfamiliar contexts and begin to recognise that science helps us understand and solve real-world problems.
- Health and Physical Education in Year 7 In Year 7, your child will learn about managing puberty, communication strategies for healthy relationships, choreographed movement and techniques, and outdoor safety. Find out more

### Health and Physical Education in Year 7
In Year 7, your child will learn about managing puberty, communication strategies for healthy relationships, choreographed movement and techniques, and outdoor safety.
- Technology in Year 7 In Year 7, your child learns to tackle real-world challenges as a problem-solver, exploring design choices and making and evaluating products to meet specific needs using more specialised knowledge. Find out more

### Technology in Year 7
In Year 7, your child learns to tackle real-world challenges as a problem-solver, exploring design choices and making and evaluating products to meet specific needs using more specialised knowledge.
- Social Sciences in Year 7 In Year 7, your child will start to connect important concepts like governance, rights, global connection, learning about The Treaty of Waitangi, extreme environments, and financial decision making. Find out more

### Social Sciences in Year 7
In Year 7, your child will start to connect important concepts like governance, rights, global connection, learning about The Treaty of Waitangi, extreme environments, and financial decision making.
- The Arts in Year 7 In Year 7, your child will engage with diverse art forms and traditions as well as deepening their artistic skills through practice and reflection. Find out more
In Year 7, your child will engage with diverse art forms and traditions as well as deepening their artistic skills through practice and reflection.
